column1: # Sources: Bureau of Justice Statistics (BJS) Prisoners series; The Sentencing Project;
#          Alexander (2010) The New Jim Crow; Census Bureau population estimates
# Note: incarcerated = state+federal prisons + local jails (estimated)
# Total incarcerated grew ~3.6x from 1980 to peak (2008): 503
# Post-1994 Crime Bill: white incarceration grew 18% (1994→2000); Hispanic +100%; confirming O_final expansion
# O_racialized (Black) rate consistently 4–6x White rate — systemic targeting confirmed
# Elite (top 1% wealth): ~0 incarceration rate — E effectively immune from O_final membership
